---
title: "Report — multiple label layouts + `;` cycle"
author: "Yun Jiang"
date: "2026-07-23"
format:
  html:
    html-math-method: mathjax
include-in-header:
  text: |
    <link rel="icon" href="data:image/svg+xml,<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 100 100'><text y='.9em' font-size='90'>🎛️</text></svg>">
---

# Bottom line

Implemented user-defined grid-layout presets cycled live with `;` while the overlay is
up (Grid only), with the active preset persisted across Esc/reopen and a full restart.
Ships with 2 defaults (dense edge grid + uniform full-screen grid). Backward-compatible:
omitting `GridLayouts` is byte-for-byte today's behavior, and `;` passes through in
Automation / single-layout mode.

Plan: [`20260723-214334_multi-layout-cycle.plan.qmd`](20260723-214334_multi-layout-cycle.plan.qmd).

# What was done

- **New `GridLayoutConfig.cs`** — `GridLayout` model + pure `ParseGridLayouts`
  (`||` between layouts, `|` between fields, regions field tolerates commas) +
  `ClampActiveLayout` (pure) + config wrappers + `FromFlatConfig` (legacy path).
- **Layout-aware grid generation** — `EnumGridHints(hWnd, bounds, layout)` with
  `null ⇒ FromFlatConfig()`; new `EnumGridHintsForBounds` / `EnumHints` overloads on
  the service + interface.
- **`OverlayViewModel.CycleLayout`** — mirrors `CycleMonitor`: advance+persist index,
  rebuild sessions via a delegate, `LoadSession`, pan reset, monitor index clamped.
  Adds `LayoutCycleCapable`, `LayoutLabel` ("L2/2"), `LayoutBadgeVisibility`.
- **`OverlayKeyboardHook`** — `;` (`VK_OEM_1`) → `CycleLayout`, gated by a new
  `layoutCycle` flag (default false) read from `_vm.LayoutCycleCapable`.
- **`ShellViewModel`** — reads `GridLayouts`/`ActiveLayout`, threads the active preset
  into both build paths, wires a rebuild delegate per path.
- **Config/Options/Badge** — `GridLayouts` + `ActiveLayout` in `App.config`; a
  multiline Options editor; a `LayoutLabel` badge (collapsed when inactive).
- **Tests** — new `GridLayoutConfigTest` (parse, defaults, regions-with-commas, wrap)
  + `;`-classification cases in `OverlayKeyboardHookTest`.

# Verification status

- **CI**: green — run `30012921849` (commit `6b92057`), conclusion `success`,
  **134/134 tests pass** (a first push failed 1/134 on a trailing-space in the
  parsed regions field; fixed by trimming the rejoined `denseRegions`). The Linux
  dev box cannot build the WPF/.NET-Framework project locally, so CI is the compile
  + unit-test gate.
- **Ship-drop**: done — Release artifact rsync'd to the Windows box at
  `/mnt/c/5.sibio/93.bk/20260627-144526.test/hap-layouts/` (`hap.exe` 99 KB +
  `hap.exe.config` with `GridLayouts`/`ActiveLayout`).
- **Manual** (Windows, user-driven, pending): badge `L1/2`→`;`→`L2/2`; Esc/reopen
  and restart both retain the choice; Automation passes `;` through; removing
  `GridLayouts` reverts to flat knobs; Options hot-reload.

Evidence the design is sound (pre-implementation): the live session-swap already
exists (`CycleMonitor`/Tab), `;` is a free OEM key that can never collide with hint
chars, and the uniform layout is just `GridDenseRegions=Center` — no new geometry.

# Risks accepted

One `hap.exe.config` rewrite per `;` (low frequency); monitor index clamped not reset
across a switch; `Shift+;` also cycles (OEM commands ignore shift); rebuild is
synchronous on the UI thread (Grid gen is pure math; Automation excluded).
